raw: {"perspective": "CTO Watchdog", "findings": [{"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The self-check loop may create noise tasks if not properly calibrated", "recommended_fix": "Implement task filtering and validation to ensure only relevant tasks are created"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "code-index auto-rebuild", "issue": "Potential performance impact from frequent code-index rebuilds", "recommended_fix": "Consider optimizing rebuild frequency or using incremental updates"}], "overall_verdict": "pass", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: The self-check loop may create noise tasks if not properly calibrated
findings.recommended_fix: Implement task filtering and validation to ensure only relevant tasks are created

findings.issue: Potential performance impact from frequent code-index rebuilds
findings.recommended_fix: Consider optimizing rebuild frequency or using incremental updates
